en.extract:
The mottle-breasted honeyeater (Meliphaga mimikae), also known as the spot-breasted meliphaga, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found throughout New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''mottle-breasted honeyeater''' ('''''Meliphaga mimikae'''''), also known as the '''spot-breasted meliphaga''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is found throughout [[New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
